name: Shenzhen Etmade Automatic Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen ETmade Automatic Equipment Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells equipment for the flat panel display industry in China. The company offers liquid crystal display module, liquid crystal glass manufacturing, touch screen, and OLED display equipment. Its products include fully automatic medium and small size polarizing attachment equipment; full fitting equipment; backlight assembly equipment; and semi-automatic film attachment equipment. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
